name: StoryAreaPosition
description: Describes the position of a clickable area within a story.

fields.name: x_percentage
fields.description: The abscissa of the area's center, as a percentage of the media width

fields.name: y_percentage
fields.description: The ordinate of the area's center, as a percentage of the media height

fields.name: width_percentage
fields.description: The width of the area's rectangle, as a percentage of the media width

fields.name: height_percentage
fields.description: The height of the area's rectangle, as a percentage of the media height

fields.name: rotation_angle
fields.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the rectangle, in degrees; 0-360

fields.name: corner_radius_percentage
fields.description: The radius of the rectangle corner rounding, as a percentage of the media width
